name: generation-time trace emits an entry tagged operator_bypass when generation occurred under skip-fresh
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"event":"generation","skip_fresh":true,"patterns_referenced":["p1"]}\n' > event.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/consumption-trace.sh" --event event.json --out pr-corpus/consumption-trace.jsonl 2>err.txt && grep -q '"operator_bypass":true' pr-corpus/consumption-trace.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
